---
title: "misch_bal"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-09-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{bash}
# === settings ===

cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/bal_s/3.input/wild

FILE="wild_merged_chr.B2.txt"   # columns: physPos genPos LR xhat Ahat numSites chr
CHR=5
OSR_L=8638062
OSR_U=8740146

# === cutoffs (0.5%, 1%, 5%) ===
N=$(awk 'NR>1{print $3}' "$FILE" | wc -l)
p05=$(( N/200 ))
p1=$(( N/100 ))
p5=$(( N/20 ))

echo "Total SNPs: $N"
echo "Ranks -> 0.5%: $p05 | 1%: $p1 | 5%: $p5"

awk 'NR>1{print $3}' "$FILE" \
  | sort -nr \
  | awk -v p05=$p05 -v p1=$p1 -v p5=$p5 '
      NR==p05 {printf("0.5%% cutoff LR: %s\n",$1)}
      NR==p1  {printf("1%% cutoff LR:   %s\n",$1)}
      NR==p5  {printf("5%% cutoff LR:   %s\n",$1)}
    '

# === max LR inside OSR gene span ===
awk -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  $7==CHR && $1>=L && $1<=U {
    if($3>max){max=$3; pos=$1}
  }
  END{
    if(max=="") print "OSR span max LR: NA"
    else printf("OSR span max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", max, pos)
  }' "$FILE"

# === max LR within ±10 kb and ±50 kb around OSR span (optional) ===
awk -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  BEGIN{L10=L-10000; if(L10<0)L10=0; U10=U+10000}
  $7==CHR && $1>=L10 && $1<=U10 {
    if($3>max){max=$3; pos=$1}
  }
  END{
    if(max=="") print "OSR ±10kb max LR: NA"
    else printf("OSR ±10kb max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", max, pos)
  }' "$FILE"

awk -v CHR=$CHR -v L=$OSR_L -v U=$OSR_U '
  BEGIN{L50=L-50000; if(L50<0)L50=0; U50=U+50000}
  $7==CHR && $1>=L50 && $1<=U50 {
    if($3>max){max=$3; pos=$1}
  }
  END{
    if(max=="") print "OSR ±50kb max LR: NA"
    else printf("OSR ±50kb max LR: %s (pos %s)\n", max, pos)
  }' "$FILE"

```
